name: Azulejo
description: Hand-glazed tilework in cobalt on white — diamonds soften into discs, corner dots hold the corners, and the glaze resets with every redraw.

code.style: --glaze: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* corner dots share the motif's emitted ink so the tile reads as one print */ --az: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --co: calc(@r(300, 360) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(14%, 22%); background: var(--glaze); border-radius: @p(0%, 0%, 50%); transform: rotate(@rand(42deg, 48deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 12%; left: 44%; top: 44%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--az); box-shadow: @var(--co) @var(--co) @var(--az), calc(@var(--co) * -1) @var(--co) @var(--az), @var(--co) calc(@var(--co) * -1) @var(--az), calc(@var(--co) * -1) calc(@var(--co) * -1) @var(--az); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
